============================================================\n// Five named presets mapping to evaporation-rate multipliers.\n// Default (\"wetOnWet\") applied at init below.\nconst EVAP_PRESETS = {\n  flooded:   1,    // half-life ~9.5s \u2014 pooled water, dramatic blooms\n  wetOnWet:  3,    // half-life ~3.2s \u2014 soft Curtis-style bleed\n  damp:      8,    // half-life ~1.2s \u2014 edges firmer, controlled\n  dryBrush:  18,   // half-life ~0.5s \u2014 granular, paint sits in place\n  boneDry:   50,   // half-life ~0.2s \u2014 almost dry-on-paper\n};\nfunction setEvaporationMult(mult) {\n  if (!isFinite(mult) || mult < 0.1) mult = 0.1;\n  if (mult > 200) mult = 200;\n  evaporationRate = Math.pow(0.9988, mult);\n}\nfunction applyEvapPreset(presetName) {\n  const mult = EVAP_PRESETS[presetName];\n  if (mult === undefined) return false;\n  setEvaporationMult(mult);\n  return true;\n}\n\n// ============================================================\n// TEXT PAINTING (v2 lib addition)\n// ============================================================\nconst TEXT_FONT_SIZE = 84;\nconst TEXT_SAMPLE_STEP = 4;\nconst TEXT_PAINT_STRENGTH = 0.40;\n\nfunction paintText(text, opts) {\n  if (!text) return 0;\n  opts = opts || {};\n  const fontSize = opts.fontSize || TEXT_FONT_SIZE;\n  const sampleStep = opts.sampleStep || TEXT_SAMPLE_STEP;\n  const strength = opts.strength || TEXT_PAINT_STRENGTH;\n  const pigment = opts.pigment !== undefined ? opts.pigment : currentPigment;\n  const centerGX = opts.x !== undefined ? opts.x : GW * 0.5;\n  const centerGY = opts.y !== undefined ? opts.y : GH * 0.5;\n\n  const tmp = document.createElement('canvas');\n  const tctx = tmp.getContext('2d');\n  const fontSpec = 'bold ' + fontSize + 'px Georgia, serif';\n  tctx.font = fontSpec;\n  const metrics = tctx.measureText(text);\n  const padX = Math.ceil(fontSize * 0.1);\n  const padY = Math.ceil(fontSize * 0.1);\n  const w = Math.max(1, Math.ceil(metrics.width) + padX * 2);\n  const h = Math.ceil(fontSize * 1.4) + padY * 2;\n  tmp.width = w;\n  tmp.height = h;\n  tctx.font = fontSpec;\n  tctx.textBaseline = 'middle';\n  tctx.fillStyle = '#000';\n  tctx.fillText(text, padX, h * 0.5);\n\n  const img = tctx.getImageData(0, 0, w, h).data;\n  const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();\n  const pxToGridRadius = (GW / rect.width) * 0.5;\n  const brushPx = sampleStep * 1.6;\n\n  markCanvasActive();\n\n  const startX = centerGX - w * 0.5;\n  const startY = centerGY - h * 0.5;\n  let painted = 0;\n  for (let py = 0; py < h; py += sampleStep) {\n    for (let px = 0; px < w; px += sampleStep) {\n      const idx = (py * w + px) * 4;\n      if (img[idx + 3] < 128) continue;\n      const gx = startX + px;\n      const gy = startY + py;\n      if (gx < 0 || gx >= GW || gy < 0 || gy >= GH) continue;\n      paintAt(gx, gy, brushPx * pxToGridRadius, pigment, strength);\n      painted++;\n    }\n  }\n  return painted;\n}\n\n// ============================================================\n// SVG TRACING (v2 lib addition)\n// ============================================================\nconst SVG_TRACE_FIT = 0.70;\nconst SVG_POINTS_PER_FRAME = 10;\nconst SVG_SAMPLE_DENSITY_CELLS = 2.0;\nconst SVG_TRACE_STRENGTH = 0.42;\nconst SVG_TRACE_BRUSH_PX = 9;\n\nlet svgTraceState = null;\n\nfunction pathStringFromSvgElement(el) {\n  const tag = el.tagName.toLowerCase();\n  if (tag === 'path') return el.getAttribute('d') || '';\n  if (tag === 'line') {\n    const x1 = el.getAttribute('x1') || 0, y1 = el.getAttribute('y1') || 0;\n    const x2 = el.getAttribute('x2') || 0, y2 = el.getAttribute('y2') || 0;\n    return 'M' + x1 + ' ' + y1 + ' L' + x2 + ' ' + y2;\n  }\n  if (tag === 'polyline' || tag === 'polygon') {\n    const pts = (el.getAttribute('points') || '').trim().split(/[\\s,]+/).map(Number);\n    if (pts.length < 4) return '';\n    let d = 'M' + pts[0] + ' ' + pts[1];\n    for (let i = 2; i + 1 < pts.length; i += 2) {\n      d += ' L' + pts[i] + ' ' + pts[i + 1];\n    }\n    if (tag === 'polygon') d += ' Z';\n    return d;\n  }\n  if (tag === 'rect') {\n    const x = +(el.getAttribute('x') || 0);\n    const y = +(el.getAttribute('y') || 0);\n    const w = +(el.getAttribute('width')  || 0);\n    const h = +(el.getAttribute('height') || 0);\n    return 'M' + x + ' ' + y + ' h' + w + ' v' + h + ' h' + (-w) + ' Z';\n  }\n  if (tag === 'circle') {\n    const cx = +(el.getAttribute('cx') || 0);\n    const cy = +(el.getAttribute('cy') || 0);\n    const r = +(el.getAttribute('r') || 0);\n    return 'M' + (cx - r) + ' ' + cy +\n      ' a' + r + ',' + r + ' 0 1,0 ' + (2 * r) + ',0' +\n      ' a' + r + ',' + r + ' 0 1,0 ' + (-2 * r) + ',0';\n  }\n  if (tag === 'ellipse') {\n    const cx = +(el.getAttribute('cx') || 0);\n    const cy = +(el.getAttribute('cy') || 0);\n    const rx = +(el.getAttribute('rx') || 0);\n    const ry = +(el.getAttribute('ry') || 0);\n    return 'M' + (cx - rx) + ' ' + cy +\n      ' a' + rx + ',' + ry + ' 0 1,0 ' + (2 * rx) + ',0' +\n      ' a' + rx + ',' + ry + ' 0 1,0 ' + (-2 * rx) + ',0';\n  }\n  return '';\n}\n\nfunction loadSVGAndTrace(svgText) {\n  const parser = new DOMParser();\n  const doc = parser.parseFromString(svgText, 'image/svg+xml');\n  const svg = doc.querySelector('svg');\n  if (!svg) throw new Error('No <svg> root found');\n\n  let viewBox = svg.getAttribute('viewBox');\n  let vbX = 0, vbY = 0, vbW = +(svg.getAttribute('width') || 100), vbH = +(svg.getAttribute('height') || 100);\n  if (viewBox) {\n    const parts = viewBox.trim().split(/[\\s,]+/).map(Number);\n    if (parts.length === 4) { vbX = parts[0]; vbY = parts[1]; vbW = parts[2]; vbH = parts[3]; }\n  }\n\n  const svgNS = 'http://www.w3.org/2000/svg';\n  const tmpSvg = document.createElementNS(svgNS, 'svg');\n  document.body.appendChild(tmpSvg);\n\n  const allPoints = [];\n  const geomEls = We tag them with data-pigment, then wire clicks.\n//\n// Pigment indices: 0=rose, 1=yellow, 2=blue, -1=water, -2=lift,\n// -3=rainbow, -4=mask. The DOM order in the panel matches these.\nconst pigmentsContainer = document.getElementById('pigments');\nconst specialContainer = document.getElementById('special-brushes');\nconst swatchEls = pigmentsContainer.innerHTML = '';\n  for (const p of standard) {\n    const el = document.createElement('button');\n    el.className = 'swatch';\n    el.dataset.pigment = String(p.idx);\n    el.title v.toFixed(1) + '\u00d7');\n// fade-halflife \u2014 original used setFadeHalfLifeMs which isn't exposed in\n// the lib yet. Hide the slider for v0.27.\nconst scaleSlider = document.getElementById('scale-slider');\nif (scaleSlider && scaleSlider.parentNode) {\n  scaleSlider.parentNode.style.display = 'none';\n}\n\n// ----- Animation / visualization / background ---------------------------\nconst animationSelect = document.getElementById('animation-mode');\nif (animationSelect) {\n  animationSelect.addEventListener('change', () => wc.setAnimation(animationSelect.value || 'off'));\n}\nconst vizSelect = document.getElementById('visualization-mode');\nif (vizSelect) {\n  vizSelect.addEventListener('change', () => wc.setVisualization(vizSelect.value || 'off'));\n}\nconst timeOfDaySelect = document.getElementById('time-of-day');\nif (timeOfDaySelect) {\n  timeOfDaySelect.addEventListener('change', () => {\n    if (timeOfDaySelect.value) wc.setBackground(timeOfDaySelect.value);\n  });\n}\n\n// ----- Action buttons ----------------------------------------------------\nfunction flash(el) {\n  if (!el) return;\n  el.classList.add('on');\n  setTimeout(() => el.classList.remove('on'), 220);\n}\nfunction wireBtn(id, fn) {\n  const el = document.getElementById(id);\n  if (!el) return;\n  el.addEventListener('click', () => { fn(); flash(el); });\n}\nwireBtn('rewet-btn',       () => wc.rewet());\nwireBtn('big-splash-btn',  () => wc.splash('bigSplash'));\nwireBtn('fine-spritz-btn', () => wc.splash('fineSpritz'));\nwireBtn('dry-btn',         () => wc.dry());\nwireBtn('remove-mask-btn', () => wc.removeMask());\nwireBtn('reset',           () => wc.reset());\nwireBtn('export-btn', () => {\n  const url = wc.exportPNG();\n  const a = ----- Toggles -----------------------------------------------------------\nfunction wireToggle(id, getter, setter) {\n  const el = document.getElementById(id);\n  if (!el) return;\n  function sync() {\n    const v = !!getter();\n    el.classList.toggle('on', v);\n    el.setAttribute('aria-pressed', String(v));\n  }\n  sync();\n  el.addEventListener('click', () => {\n    setter(!getter());\n    sync();\n  });\n}\nwireToggle('toggle-edge',     () => wc.edgeDarkening(),     v => wc.edgeDarkening(v));\nwireToggle('toggle-fade',     () => wc.fadePainting(),      v => not supported in lib v2 yet \u2014 disable visually.\nconst webglToggle = document.getElementById('toggle-webgl');\nif (webglToggle) {\n  webglToggle.disabled = true;\n  webglToggle.style.opacity = document.getElementById('paper-color');\nif (paperColorEl) {\n  // Initialize from library\n  const c = wc.paperColor();\n  const toHex = (f) => Math.round(f * 255).toString(16).padStart(2, '0');\n  paperColorEl.value = '#' + toHex(c.r) + toHex(c.g) + toHex(c.b);\n  paperColorEl.addEventListener('input', () => {\n    const hex = paperColorEl.value.replace(/^#/, '');\n    const r = parseInt(hex.substr(0, 2), 16) / 255;\n    const g = parseInt(hex.substr(2, 2), 16) / 255;\n    const b = parseInt(hex.substr(4, 2), 16) / 255;\n    wc.paperColor(r, g, b);\n    // Also update the page body background to match (matches v0.26.2).\n    document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--canvas-bg', paperColorEl.value);\n  });\n}\n\n// ----- Text painting ----------------------------------------------------\nconst textField = document.getElementById('text-input');\nconst textBtn   = document.getElementById('text-paint-btn');\nfunction doTextPaint() {\n ------------------------------------------------------\nconst svgFileInput = document.getElementById('svg-file-input');\nconst svgLoadBtn   = document.getElementById('svg-load-btn');\nif (svgLoadBtn && svgFileInput) {\n  svgLoadBtn.addEventListener('click', () => svgFileInput.click());\n  svgFileInput.addEventListener('change', async (e) => {\n    const file = e.target.files && e.target.files[0];\n    if (!file) return;\n    const text = await file.text();\n    try {\n      wc.traceSVG(text);\n      flash(svgLoadBtn);\n    } catch (err) {\n      console.error('SVG trace failed:', err);\n    }\n    svgFileInput.value = '';  // allow re-loading same file\n  });\n}\n\n// ----- Cursor preview ---------------------------------------------------\n// Re-implements v0.26.2's floating cursor preview using the library's\n// brushSize + pigment APIs. The element exists in HTML as #cursor.\nconst cursorEl = document.getElementById('cursor');\nlet _cursorVisible = false;\nfunction updateCursorPreview() {\n  if (!cursorEl) return;\n  const size = wc.brushSize();\n  cursorEl.style.width  = size + 'px';\n  cursorEl.style.height = size + 'px';\n  const pig = wc.pigment();\n  // Style based on pigment. v0.26.2 had matching applyCursorColor logic.\n  cursorEl.style.borderStyle = 'solid';\n  if (pig === -1) {\n    // water\n    cursorEl.style.background = 'rgba(180, 210, 220, 0.18)';\n    cursorEl.style.border = '1.5px solid rgba(110, 145, 160, 0.65)';\n  } else if (pig === -2) {\n    // lift\n    cursorEl.style.background = 'rgba(245, 240, 232, 0.22)';\n    cursorEl.style.border = '1.5px dashed rgba(95, 85, 75, 0.78)';\n  } else if (pig === -3) {\n    // rainbow \u2014 color updated each frame by the loop below\n    cursorEl.style.border = '1.5px solid rgba(95, 85, 75, 0.55)';\n  } else if (pig === -4) {\n    // mask\n    cursorEl.style.background = 'rgba(232, 196, 74, 0.40)';\n    cursorEl.style.border = '1.5px dashed rgba(180, 140, 30, 0.78)';\n  } else {\n    // standard pigment \u2014 use swatch color\n    const colors = ['#c95e84', '#e8c44a', '#5089b0'];\n    cursorEl.style.background = colors[pig] || '#c95e84';\n    cursorEl.style.border = '1.5px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.30)';\n  }\n}\nfunction tickRainbowCursor() {\n  if (!cursorEl) return;\n  if (wc.pigment() === -3) {\n    const c = wc.rainbowColor();\n    const r = Math.round(c.r * 255 + 100);   // brighten \u2014 Sx are reflectance contributions\n    const g = Math.round(c.g * 255 + 100);\n    const b = Math.round(c.b * 255 + 100);\n    cursorEl.style.background = 'rgba(' + r + ',' + g + ',' + b + ',0.40)';\n  }\n  requestAnimationFrame(tickRainbowCursor);\n}\ntickRainbowCursor();\nupdateCursorPreview();\n\ndocument.addEventListener('pointermove', (e) => {\n  if (!cursorEl) return;\n  cursorEl.style.left = e.clientX + 'px';\n  cursorEl.style.top  = e.clientY + 'px';\n  if (!_cursorVisible) {\n    cursorEl.style.opacity = '1';\n    _cursorVisible = true;\n  }\n});\ndocument.addEventListener('pointerleave', () => {\n  if (cursorEl) cursorEl.style.opacity = '0';\n  _cursorVisible = false;\n});\n\n// ----- UI visibility toggle ---------------------------------------------\nconst uiToggle = document.getElementById('ui-toggle');\nif (uiToggle) {\n  let hidden = false;\n  function syncUI() {\n    document.body.classList.toggle('ui-hidden', hidden);\n    uiToggle.textContent = hidden ? '+' : '\u2212';\n    uiToggle.setAttribute('aria-pressed', String(hidden));\n    uiToggle.setAttribute('aria-label', hidden ? 'Show controls' : 'Hide controls');\n  }\n  uiToggle.addEventListener('click', () => { hidden = !hidden; syncUI(); });\n  // 'H' shortcut to match v0.26.2\n  document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {\n    if (e.target && (e.target.tagName === 'INPUT' || e.target.tagName === 'TEXTAREA')) return;\n    if (e.key === 'h' || e.key === 'H') { hidden = !hidden; syncUI(); }\n  });\n}\n\n// ----- Perf overlay -----------------------------------------------------\n// Lib v2 doesn't expose perf metrics yet. document.getElementById('svg-load-btn');\\nif (svgLoadBtn && svgFileInput) {\\n  svgLoadBtn.addEventListener('click', () => svgFileInput.click());\\n  svgFileInput.addEventListener('change', async (e) => {\\n    const file = e.target.files && e.target.files[0];\\n    if (!file) return;\\n    const text = await file.text();\\n    try {\\n      wc.traceSVG(text);\\n      flash(svgLoadBtn);\\n    } catch (err) {\\n      console.error('SVG trace failed:', err);\\n    }\\n    svgFileInput.value = '';  // allow re-loading same file\\n  });\\n}\\n\\n// ----- Cursor preview ---------------------------------------------------\\n// Re-implements v0.26.2's floating cursor preview using the library's\\n// brushSize + pigment APIs. The element exists in HTML as #cursor.\\nconst cursorEl = document.getElementById('cursor');\\nlet _cursorVisible = false;\\nfunction updateCursorPreview() {\\n  if (!cursorEl) return;\\n  const size = wc.brushSize();\\n  cursorEl.style.width  = size + 'px';\\n  cursorEl.style.height = size + 'px';\\n  const pig = wc.pigment();\\n  // Style based on pigment. v0.26.2 had matching applyCursorColor logic.\\n  cursorEl.style.borderStyle = 'solid';\\n  if (pig === -1) {\\n    // water\\n    cursorEl.style.background = 'rgba(180, 210, 220, 0.18)';\\n    cursorEl.style.border = '1.5px solid rgba(110, 145, 160, 0.65)';\\n  } else if (pig === -2) {\\n    // lift\\n    cursorEl.style.background = 'rgba(245, 240, 232, 0.22)';\\n    cursorEl.style.border = '1.5px dashed rgba(95, 85, 75, 0.78)';\\n  } else if (pig === -3) {\\n    // rainbow \\u2014 color updated each frame by the loop below\\n    cursorEl.style.border = '1.5px solid rgba(95, 85, 75, 0.55)';\\n  } else if (pig === -4) {\\n    // mask\\n    cursorEl.style.background = 'rgba(232, 196, 74, 0.40)';\\n    cursorEl.style.border = '1.5px dashed rgba(180, 140, 30, 0.78)';\\n  } else {\\n    // standard pigment \\u2014 use swatch color\\n    const colors = ['#c95e84', '#e8c44a', '#5089b0'];\\n    cursorEl.style.background = colors[pig] || '#c95e84';\\n    cursorEl.style.border = '1.5px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.30)';\\n  }\\n}\\nfunction tickRainbowCursor() {\\n  if (!cursorEl) return;\\n  if (wc.pigment() === -3) {\\n    const c = wc.rainbowColor();\\n    const r = Math.round(c.r * 255 + 100);   // brighten \\u2014 Sx are reflectance contributions\\n    const g = Math.round(c.g * 255 + 100);\\n    const b = Math.round(c.b * 255 + 100);\\n    cursorEl.style.background = 'rgba(' + r + ',' + g + ',' + b + ',0.40)';\\n  }\\n  requestAnimationFrame(tickRainbowCursor);\\n}\\ntickRainbowCursor();\\nupdateCursorPreview();\\n\\ndocument.addEventListener('pointermove', (e) => {\\n  if (!cursorEl) return;\\n  cursorEl.style.left = e.clientX + 'px';\\n  cursorEl.style.top  = e.clientY + 'px';\\n  if (!_cursorVisible) {\\n    cursorEl.style.opacity = '1';\\n    _cursorVisible = true;\\n  }\\n});\\ndocument.addEventListener('pointerleave', () => {\\n  if (cursorEl) cursorEl.style.opacity = '0';\\n  _cursorVisible = false;\\n});\\n\\n// ----- UI visibility toggle ---------------------------------------------\\nconst uiToggle = document.getElementById('ui-toggle');\\nif (uiToggle) {\\n  let hidden = false;\\n  function syncUI() {\\n    document.body.classList.toggle('ui-hidden', hidden);\\n    uiToggle.textContent = hidden ? '+' : '\\u2212';\\n    uiToggle.setAttribute('aria-pressed', String(hidden));\\n    uiToggle.setAttribute('aria-label', hidden ? 'Show controls' : 'Hide controls');\\n  }\\n  uiToggle.addEventListener('click', () => { hidden = !hidden; syncUI(); });\\n  // 'H' shortcut to match v0.26.2\\n  document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {\\n    if (e.target && (e.target.tagName === 'INPUT' || e.target.tagName === 'TEXTAREA')) return;\\n    if (e.key === 'h' || e.key === 'H') { hidden = !hidden; syncUI(); }\\n  });\\n}\\n\\n// ----- Perf overlay -----------------------------------------------------\\n// Lib v2 doesn't expose perf metrics yet. Hide the overlay if it exists.\\nconst perfOverlay = document.getElementById('perf-overlay');\\nif (perfOverlay) perfOverlay.hidden = true;\\n\\n// ----- Dryness indicator + pigment readout ------------------------------\\n// Poll the lib's state() every ~250ms to update the bottom bar and the\\n// pigment readout label. Same visual feel as v0.26.2.\\nconst dryFill = document.getElementById('dryness-fill');\\nconst pigFill = document.getElementById('pigment-fill');\\nconst pigReadout = document.getElementById('pigment-readout');\\n\\nfunction updateReadouts() {\\n  const s = wc.state();\\n  const pNames = ['Quinacridone Rose', 'Hansa Yellow', 'Cerulean Blue'];\\n  const specialNames = { '-1': 'Water', '-2': 'Lift', '-3': 'Rainbow', '-4': 'Mask' };\\n  const name = s.pigment >= 0 ? pNames[s.pigment] : specialNames[String(s.pigment)];\\n  if (pigReadout) pigReadout.textContent = name || '';\\n\\n  // Crude indicator: full when something is happening, partial otherwise.\\n  const running = s.backgroundRunning || s.animationMode !== 'off' || s.visualizationMode !== 'off';\\n  if (dryFill) dryFill.style.width = running ? '100%' : '30%';\\n}\\nsetInterval(updateReadouts, 250);\\nupdateReadouts();\\n\\n// ----- Console hint -----------------------------------------------------\\nconsole.log(\\n  '%cWatercolor v0.27 %c\\u00b7 lib v2 \\u00b7 %c' + Object.keys(wc).filter(k => typeof wc[k] === 'function').length + ' methods on window.Watercolor',\\n  'color:#d4a373;font-weight:bold', 'color:#888', 'color:#888'\\n);\\n\", \"filename\": \"/home/claude/_v027-wiring.js\"}"
